confirmed: reproducible retained ambient-pressure superconductivity in Hg1223
best supported PQ/TQ window is 10.1-28.4 GPa at 4.2 K
best carried retained onset Tc is 151 K
retained state survives at least 3 days at 77 K
retrieved sample shows about 78 percent bulk fraction
PQed phase remains tetragonal with line broadening
partial: room-temperature handling partially anneals the retained state
strain or defect stabilization is supported but not fully isolated
headline values use onset Tc rather than a full zero-resistance reproducibility ledger
unknown: oxygen-state dependence of the retained window
